app.name: Olyq
app.workspaceCrashedDescription: This extension page failed to render. Refresh the extension page to continue.

welcome.title: Start a new conversation
welcome.description: Ask directly, or organize some context first and send it to {{modelName}}.
welcome.askDesc: Draft, summarize, analyze the current page, or break down a complex task step by step.
welcome.attachDesc: Paste long text, drop in images, or add files so the model sees the full picture.
welcome.modelDesc: Mention a model with @, or switch to one that fits writing, coding, search, or reasoning.
